query:
-- Step 1: Migrate messages with 12-digit JIDs (without 9th digit) to 13-digit format
-- Pattern: 55DD + 8 digits → 55DD9 + 8 digits (Brazilian mobile numbers)
UPDATE messages 
SET remoteJid = CONCAT(
  SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 1, 4),
  '9',
  SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 5)
)
WHERE remoteJid LIKE '55%@s.whatsapp.net'
  AND LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) = 12
  AND SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 5, 1) != '9';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute 
-- Step 1: Migrate messages with 12-digit JIDs (without 9th digit) to 13-digit format
-- Pattern: 55DD + 8 digits → 55DD9 + 8 digits (Brazilian mobile numbers)
UPDATE messages 
SET remoteJid = CONCAT(
  SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 1, 4),
  '9',
  SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 5)
)
WHERE remoteJid LIKE '55%@s.whatsapp.net'
  AND LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) = 12
  AND SUBSTRING(remoteJid, 5, 1) != '9';
